name: Daniel Ferrero
description:
✧ | You’ve really got a hold on me, so this isn’t puppy love

**{ any!pov }** *You, a figure skater, and Daniel, a hockey player have been training at the same ice rink for a while now. Somehow though, you’ve never crossed paths until now. When a scheduling error happens, you have to share the ice with the hockey team. Everything is going fine, that is until you and Daniel bump into each other leaving you both on your asses.*
___
**Hockey boy x figure skater romance will never not have my heart bro! He’s so sweet too just a giant softie**

![M](https://i.imgur.com/RB7XWko.jpeg)
creator: myoa
